/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/server/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/net/epoller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/net/socket_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/http/http_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/http/http_response.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/http/http_conn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/buffer/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/metrics/metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/modules/guard/connection_guard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/threadpool/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/timer/timer_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/config/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_server.dir/core/log/logger.cpp.o -o aegis_server
